ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parent company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plastic_types" (
  "plastic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plastic type */,
  "plastic_name" TEXT /* Name of the plastic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plastic type */,
  "recycling_rate" REAL /* Average recycling rate for the plastic type */,
  "common_uses" TEXT /* Common uses of the plastic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plastic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the event was held */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent company involved in the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the collection event */,
  "num_volunteers" INTEGER /* Number of volunteers participating in the event */,
  "num_events" INTEGER /* Number of collection events organized by the company in the country */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who organized the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event during which the plastic was collected */,
  "plastic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plastic type collected */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the plastic type collected */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating of the collected plastic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES collection_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_plastic_id FOREIGN KEY ("plastic_id") REFERENCES plastic_types ("plastic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the target is set */,
  "plastic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plastic type for which the target is set */,
  "target_quantity" INTEGER /* Target quantity of the plastic type to be collected */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the target should be achieved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the target (e.g., ongoing, achieved, missed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who set the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_plastic_id FOREIGN KEY ("plastic_id") REFERENCES plastic_types ("plastic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the plastic type collected toward the target */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes on the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria to be eligible for the incentive */,
  "value" TEXT /* Monetary or other value of the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, company representative, volunteer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
